creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Duchateau from comment #0)
> Created attachment 186597 [details]
> Patch to update sysutils/xfce4-battery-plugin
> 
> - Update to 1.1.0
> - Sort USES
> - Adjust dependencies (reported by QA script)
> - Make portlint happy
> - Regenerate patch (with 'make makepatch')

Thanks! I'll be testing this in the next few days.

BTW the port has SSP_UNSAFE=yes. Have you tested disabling that? Is it still necessary?

If not I'll try that, just to make sure.
